key_metrics: Operating Profit: $3.05 billion (vs $3.15 billion in Q3 2024)
Cost of Goods Sold: $11.67 billion (+16.0% YoY)
qoq_changes: Sequential quarterly data is not explicitly provided in the excerpt, but Q3 revenue of $17.64B contributed to a 9-month total of $48.46B.

management_tone: Neutral to cautious; while top-line revenue demonstrated solid growth, rising costs compressed operating margins and led to a year-over-year decline in net income.
analyst_note: Caterpillar's Q3 2025 results highlight a divergence between top-line growth (+9.5% YoY) and bottom-line contraction (-6.7% YoY), driven by a 16% increase in cost of goods sold that warrants monitoring for ongoing margin pressure.
